testcase.name: contextLoads

17:05:33.468 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.demo.QuizappApplicationTests]: QuizappApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 17:05:33.612 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.demo.QuizappApplication for test class com.example.demo.QuizappApplicationTests
